steps.title: Translate the budget into an equation
steps.content: The total budget is made of two parts: departmental expenses plus all other expenses. That means $x=y+201$, where $201$ is the amount not in departmental expenses.

steps.title: Check the relationship in Desmos
steps.content: A quick choice check is to pick an easy departmental budget, such as $y=500$. Then the total must be $x=701$. Plot the point $(701,500)$ and graph the choices. Only $x-y=201$ passes through that context-valid point.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice B, $x-y=201$, means total minus departmental expenses equals all other expenses. That matches the wording, so choice B is correct.
